name: claude-skills
description: Ian Lawrence personal skill library for investment analysis and deal intelligence

plugins.name: deal-master
plugins.description: Deal workflow entry point: inventories existing work, loads the analytical and evidence-control layers, initializes the belief register, and routes the next phase.

plugins.name: analytical-operating-system
plugins.description: Evidence-control layer for deal work: F/E/H claim tagging, belief registers, Bayesian updates, kill triggers, and PROCEED / REPRICE / PASS / RESOLVE FIRST posture.

plugins.name: deal-research
plugins.description: Phase 2 research tools: market sizing, competitive landscape, moat assessment, TAM/SAM/SOM, DDR generation, and structured screening.

plugins.name: deal-diligence
plugins.description: Phase 3 deep diligence: NTB quality check, driver tree, boundability assessment, financial model, GTM metrics, and KPI tree. Requires data room for financial/GTM skills.

plugins.name: deal-output
plugins.description: Phase 4-6 drafting and production: IC memo, quality passes (claim scrutinizer, red team, pre-mortem), Pattern-branded DOCX/PPTX output, and executive summary.
